lens: source-containment (HARD gate): every spoken numeral, named entity, and factual claim must be present in that card's SME source slide OR on the rendered slide; no invented specificity
methodology_note: Independent re-derivation. Read all 9 narration segments and all 9 SME source slides verbatim; built a per-segment inventory of every spoken numeral / named person / named study/program/company / factual claim and located each in the card's source speaker notes. Did NOT consult or copy Irene's pass-2 receipt. For the three segments carrying countable figures or named third-party media (seg 3 'five examples' + 5 named innovators; seg 5 'eight definitions'; seg 7 David Epstein video title), additionally opened the rendered deck-final PNGs to confirm on-slide presence. Citations on cards (NAM 2019, ACEP May 2020, PMC4106555, PMC3960713) are correctly NOT voiced. The UNRESOLVED WHO Surgical Safety Checklist PDF is correctly NOT voiced and NOT asserted present.
